data_description.baudrate: Speed of the serial connection, higher speed gives better performance.
data_description.bytesize: Data size in bits of each byte.
data_description.method: Method of the connection to modbus.
data_description.port: Serial port or USB device where your modbus device is connected to your Home Assistant.

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of your modbus device, e.g. `192.168.1.1`

data_description.name: The name of the modbus hub. Must be unique.

auto_scheduling.title: Auto scheduling configuration
auto_scheduling.description: Select a weather entity and provide PV system configuration.

data_description.weather_entity_id: Weather entity of which to retrieve the forecast.
data_description.selected_schedule: Schedule to use for auto scheduling.

data_description.nominal_power_wp: The total Wp of the PV system
data_description.orientation: Select the direction the PV panels are facing towards. For panels that are placed East/West, select 'EW' for 50/50 distribution of the total Wp.
data_description.annual_efficiency_decrease: Enter the annual efficiency decrease in percent. Leave at `0` if unknown.
data_description.pv_installation_date: The (approximate) installation date to calculate the current system efficiency.

data_description.dhw_boiler_volume: The DHW boiler volume in L
data_description.dhw_heat_loss_rate: The DHW boiler heat loss rate in Watts
data_description.dhw_boiler_energy_label: DHW boiler energy label. Used if heat loss rate is `0`, otherwise ignored.

bootstrap_blenders.name: Bootstrap blenders
bootstrap_blenders.description: Bootstrap connections with other integrations. Calling this multiple times has no additional effect.

create_default_zone_schema.name: Create a default zone schedule
create_default_zone_schema.description: Create a default zone schedule for the given schedule and day.

weekday.name: Select the weekday to apply the schedule to

dhw_auto_schedule.name: DHW auto scheduling
dhw_auto_schedule.description: Create a DHW schedule for the next day based on weather forecast and boiler/solar configuration. Requires a weather integration that provides solar irradiance (GHI) in hourly forecasts.

force_system_rediscovery.name: Force system rediscovery
force_system_rediscovery.description: Force your Remeha appliance to rediscover device- and zone metadata. A restart of Home Assistant is required after running this service.

read_registers.name: Read modbus registers
read_registers.description: Read a list of consecutive modbus registers from the GTW-08

register_count.name: Register count
register_count.description: The amount of registers to read

struct_format.name: Struct format
struct_format.description: The struct format, following the [python3 struct format]({python_struct_format_docs_url}).

auto_schedule_unsupported_temperature_un.message: Entity {entity_id} uses an unsupported temperature unit {unit_of_temperature}.

auto_schedule_no_dhw_climate.message: Cannot auto schedule: no DHW entity exists in Remeha Modbus integration.

auto_schedule_no_forecasts.message: Cannot auto schedule: no weather forecasts available.

auto_schedule_forecast_not_enough_hours.message: Cannot auto schedule: latest available forecast time is {max_forecast_time}, but to schedule a day ahead this must be at least {min_required_end_time}. Please wait until this time and try again.

auto_schedule_no_solar_irradiance.message: Cannot auto schedule: `solar_irradiance` is a required field in the hourly weather forecast. Please use a weather integration that supports this.

auto_schedule_modbus_error.message: Cannot auto schedule: a modbus error occurred, see logs for details. Please try again at a later time.

auto_schedule_value_error.message: Cannot auto schedule: error while deserializing modbus response, see logs for details.

bootstrap_blenders_error.message: Error while setting up links with other integrations.

climate_invalid_operation_ctx.message: Requested operation {operation} is invalid in preset mode {preset_mode}.

climate_invalid_operation_ctx_hvac.message: Setting HVAC mode to {hvac_mode} is unsupported for zone {zone_name}.

incorrect_entity_platform.message: Entity {entity_id} doesn't belong to the expected platform {expected_platform} and/or the integration {expected_component}.

missing_external_component.message: Missing external component {component}. Please install it and retry; installation instructions are at {url}.

parse_error_entity_not_found.message: Cannot parse ZoneSchedule into scheduler schedule: The required climate entity cannot be found.

parse_error_multiple_weekdays.message: Cannot parse state {schedule_entity_id} into ZoneSchedule: schedule is for multiple weekdays but require exactly one.

parse_error_scheduler_state_action.message: Cannot parse state {schedule_entity_id} into ZoneSchedule: missing required service call to set preset mode.

parse_error_time_slot.message: Cannot parse state {schedule_entity_id} into ZoneSchedule: timeslot string {time_slot} must have exactly two parts, but got {part_count}.

read_registers_illegal_struct_format.message: Cannot parse result: illegal struct format {struct_format}.

read_registers_unknown_error.message: An unknown error occurred while reading modbus registers. See log for details.

schedule_update_non_equal_climates.message: Cannot determine zone schedule updates: a climate zone has been added or removed.

scenario_execution_error_missing_require.message: Cannot execute scenario {scenario}: missing required entity state from {component} integration.

scenario_execution_error_missing_climate.message: Cannot execute scenario {scenario}: climate linked to scheduler.schedule {scheduler_entity} is missing.

service_error_missing_state.message: Cannot process newly added entity {entity_id}: new state is unavailable.

update_failed_discovery_table_corrupted.message: Modbus discovery table corrupted. Please visit your repairs dashboard to fix this.

update_failed_invalid_zone_schedule.message: Failed to update: zone {zone} uses selected schedule {selected_schedule} which failed to decode. Please visit your repairs dashboard to fix this.

update_failed_modbus_exception.message: Failed to update due to modbus exception: {modbus_message}

confirm_force_rediscovery.title: Force modbus discovery
confirm_force_rediscovery.description: The GTW-08 discovery table seems to be corrupted. You can fix this by forcing its rediscovery and restarting Home Assistant. This does not affect the settings of your Remeha appliance.

heatpump_managed_schedules_turned_off.title: Time schedules not managed by appliance

confirm_undo.title: Let appliance manage time schedules
confirm_undo.description: You turned off a switch which causes Home Assistant to manage time schedules directly instead of letting the Remeha appliance manage that. Click submit to revert this, or reboot Home Assistant to ignore this issue.

confirm_overwrite.title: Overwrite faulty schedule
confirm_overwrite.description:
> [!WARNING]
> A zone schedule failed to parse. To fix this issue, overwrite the faulty zone schedule with a default schedule that only uses the anti-frost/eco preset, depending on the zone type.

> If you suspect this is a bug rather than a faulty zone schema, please report an issue [here]({issue_tracker_url}).

confirm_restart.title: Restart required
confirm_restart.description: Your Remeha appliance has issued a system rediscovery, and a restart of Home Assistant is required. Click submit to restart now.
